0.text: Hilar mass continuous with parenchymal atelectasis in the left lower lobe basal segment

1.text: Soft tissue with indistinguishable borders in the left lower lobe basal segment

2.text: Numerous intraparenchymal nodules in the left lower lobe basal segment

3.text: Suspicious increase in the size of intraparenchymal nodules in the lower lobe of the left lung

4.text: Increased bronchial wall thickness in segmental bronchi

5.text: Ground-glass densities around segmental bronchi in the left lung parenchyma

6.text: Slight ground-glass densities around the right lung lower lobe segment bronchi
